channel.title: Projects on Rathtakrit
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Rathtakrit

item.title: Soundtaste
item.description: A Thai podcast created with friends — exploring music, culture, and the stories behind what we listen to.
item.content:encoded: A casual Thai podcast recorded with friends, diving into music discoveries, cultural conversations, and personal stories. Published on YouTube.

item.title: Login Visualizer
item.description: Visualize all login attempts of a user (e.g. Google account) to see where it's linking to all services — mapping the web of connected apps, sessions, and access grants across your digital identity.
item.content:encoded:
What to Study

  • OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect — the authentication and authorization protocols underpinning modern login flows, token issuance, and identity federation
  • Google Account Activity APIs — accessing login history, connected apps, and security events via the Google API ecosystem
  • Network Graph Visualization — rendering interactive graphs with D3.js, vis.js, or Cytoscape.js to map service connections
  • Session / Token Management — understanding refresh tokens, access token scopes, and revocation flows
  • Data Privacy — handling PII responsibly, minimizing data collection, and applying privacy-by-design principles
